title: Senior SEO Specialist at Ajio Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Ajio Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Ajio Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ajio Advisory Limited:
Ajio Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
